title: Human embryonic gonad dissociation with Collagenase & Trypsin
author: Carmen Sancho
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bwcipaue

steps.title: Heat-inactivate FBS at 56 °C for 00:30:00 before use
steps.instruction: Heat-inactivate FBS at 56 °C for 00:30:00 before use. Collagenase mix recipe: %s %s

steps.title: Digestion mix recipe
steps.instruction: Digestion mix recipe: %s %s

steps.title: Wash tissue with PBS
steps.instruction: Wash tissue with PBS.

steps.title: Place wet tissue under a petri dish
steps.instruction: Place wet tissue under a petri dish. Take 2 scalpels and roughly mince up the tissue. This step is crucial to increase the efficiency of the digestion.

steps.title: Transfer contents to 15ml falcon containing...
steps.instruction: Transfer contents to 15ml falcon containing the collagenase mix (~ 10 mL /tissue but it will depend on the size of the tissue.

steps.title: Tighten lid and then seal with parafilm
steps.instruction: Tighten lid and then seal with parafilm.

steps.title: Incubate at 37 °C for 00:45:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37 °C for 00:45:00 . Shacking every 10 min during the incubation is recommended.

steps.title: Filter sample through small strain (100...
steps.instruction: Filter sample through small strain (100 um) and keep the filter.

steps.title: Centrifuge 450 g, 00:05:00 (0
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 450 g, 00:05:00 (0.5 rcf, 5mins), 4 degrees

steps.title: Remove carefully 90% of the media...
steps.instruction: Remove carefully 90% of the media by decanting the tube (leave between 0.5 ml and 1 ml).

steps.title: Resuspend the cell pellet in 2...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the cell pellet in 2 ml of PBS and pass it through the inverted filter adding extra 3 mL of PBS

steps.title: Centrifuge 450g, 5 min, 4 degrees
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 450g, 5 min, 4 degrees

steps.title: Remove carefully 90% of the media...
steps.instruction: Remove carefully 90% of the media by decanting the tube (leave between 0.5 ml and 1 ml) and transfer to a 1mL eppendorf

steps.title: Centrifuge 450 g, 00:05:00 (0
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 450 g, 00:05:00 (0.5 rcf, 5mins) and discard supernatant

steps.title: Add 700 microL Trypsin-EDTA/DNase I and...
steps.instruction: Add 700 microL Trypsin-EDTA/DNase I and Incubate at 37 °C for 10 min with rotation.

steps.title: Add 700 microL RPMI complete and...
steps.instruction: Add 700 microL RPMI complete and filter trhough a Facs tube passing 1mL more of media.

steps.title: Transfer to a 5 mL eppendorf...
steps.instruction: Transfer to a 5 mL eppendorf and Centrifuge 450 g, 00:05:00 (0.5 rcf, 5mins)

steps.title: Discard supernatant without disrupting the cell...
steps.instruction: Discard supernatant without disrupting the cell pellet and with 1 mL of PBS-BSA 0.04%, transfer to a 1,5 mL eppendorf

steps.title: Centrifuge 450 g, 00:05:00 (0
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 450 g, 00:05:00 (0.5 rcf, 5mins) and leave 200-300 microL

steps.title: Proceed to cell count with disposable C-chip haematocytometer
steps.instruction: Proceed to cell count with disposable C-chip haematocytometer.
